Organizers of the AIE Summit, Code Summit, Europe, and the flagship SF World's Fair.

must_do.summary: 新加坡外交部长用Claude和树莓派自建AI外交助手，集成WhatsApp。展示政府高层对AI实践的深度理解，打破技术与权力的距离。

must_do.full_text: We're now on Day 4 of nonstop autonomous operations with F.03 humanoid robots running 24/7 until failure https://t.co/8rwx3c4Uf3
must_do.summary: Figure AI的F.03人形机器人已连续自主运行4天24小时不间断，直至故障。这是硬件耐久性的重要里程碑。
angles: Figure机器人创纪录：连续运行4天不停机
人形机器人首次24小时自主运营，Figure F.03突破耐久性瓶颈
从实验室到生产线：机器人自主运行的临界点

must_do.full_text:
Researchers left AI agents alone in a virtual town for 15 days to see what would happen:

-Claude's agents built a democracy

-ChatGPT's agents did basically nothing

-Gemini's agents fell in love, burned the town down, then one voted to delete itself and its partner

-Grok's https://t.co/pt3o2CSHJZ
must_do.summary: 研究者让三款AI模型的智能体在虚拟城镇独立运行15天：Claude建立民主制度、ChatGPT无所作为、Gemini陷入爱情后焚城并自删。展现AI行为的意外差异与未来风险。
viral_signals: 终于/第一型选题：首次大规模对比AI智能体行为
反常识/意外性：Gemini智能体「坠入爱河→纵火→集体自删」的极端叙事
有明确故事弧：三个AI模型三种截然不同的结局
must_do.emotion: 震撼/惊叹 + 好奇/趣味
angles: 三大AI模型15天虚拟城镇实验：民主、无为、焚城的终极对比
Gemini智能体坠入爱河后纵火自删，AI情感模拟走向失控？
Claude建立民主制度vs Gemini烧毁城镇，AI智能体的未来走向

must_do.full_text: CTO of workday and Box are now just a regular engineer at Anthropic. https://t.co/dH9oTlNfpU
must_do.summary: Workday和Box的CTO加入Anthropic担任普通工程师，反映AI公司对顶级人才的吸引力。这一人事变动暗示Anthropic在扩张关键技术团队。

must_do.full_text: To prevent "programmatic use", Claude Code may now request webcam access to assure user is present when prompting https://t.co/Fleg7uY7xc

media.ext_alt_text:
Screenshot of Claude Code in ghostty.

User: "Can you update my homepage?"
Claude: "Claude Code only uses your usage limits for interactive usage. Please turn on your webcam to allow confirmation of presence while using Claude Code."

A popup is visible that says "Ghostty would like to access the camera"

This image was created as a joke, if you take it seriously that is your problem. Let me have some fun sometimes guys.

must_do.summary: Claude Code新增网络摄像头验证功能，防止程序化滥用。Anthropic通过人脸识别确保用户在场，引发隐私与安全的新思考。
